allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs", "C:\\Program Files", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)", "C:\\Benny\\Tools", "C:\\Tools"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Get-ChildItem $p -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'godot|unity|flutter' } | Select-Object FullName } }; try { \(Get-Command godot -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "godot not in PATH" }; try { \(Get-Command godot4 -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "godot4 not in PATH" })
